text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, as I'm passing by the central plaza...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Hehe. What a sweetheart you are.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha, that tickles! ♪ So this is what it's like to
get a pat on the head!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Oh my! You must be—

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Hi, Trainer! Hehehe, nice to see you. ♪
choice_data_list: So, uh... what's going on here?
So, uh... what's going on here?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Exactly what it looks like. This is Fine's pampering
time.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
She's always working so hard, what with all that
studying, racing, and her duties. So she must be
spoiled in kind.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: I appreciate your consideration, Creek. ♪

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I wish to honor the tenderness you've shown me...
So I'll give you a pat in return! ♪

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Oh my, what's this?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
This is your time to be spoiled. Just surrender
yourself to my care, dear.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
You must be tired from all those documents you
were just writing. Why don't I give you a firm hand
massage?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I can't believe you even notice little things
like that!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
However, my stay here in Japan is partially
conditional on my performance of those tasks, so
they don't feel bothersome at all.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I look forward to studying alongside you as a
student of this academy, Creek.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion takes the hand Super Creek
extended in her attempted massage and gives her
a firm handshake.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Um, yes, I feel the same...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Super Creek continues her attempts to spoil Fine
Motion afterward, but...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
It seems like you're having fun, Fine, but I get the
feeling that you still need more pats.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
You need to take advantage of your academy
life. I think it's quite all right to take a break from
time to time.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
There's no problem with forgetting about
everything else and letting your hair down on
occasion, you know.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Thanks, both of you! But, you see...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I'm already quite spoiled. The very fact that I'm
allowed to be here right now is proof of that.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I get to run in the races I love so much, and I've
been able to experience all kinds of thrills and
excitement.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: You know, like the tastiness of cup ramen! ♪
choice_data_list: Then let's enjoy this time to the fullest!
That just makes us want to spoil you more!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
That's right. That does sound like the very best
way to spoil her.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Let's all make loads and loads of wonderful
memories together! ♪

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Is there something you want to do right now?
Anything that's caught your eye or a place you
want to visit? Please tell us! ♪

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Let's see... There are so many things, to tell the
truth.
choice_data_list: No problem! Let's do them all!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Really? Then first, I'd like to peruse the food
section in the department store! There's a
seasonal dessert fair on right now! ♪

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Then, let's go! And after, you can tell us the next
thing you want to do.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Okay!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, we accompany Fine Motion on various
endeavors for the remainder of the day, enjoying
each moment as it comes.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Today was so fun! I'll never forget it.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
After all, none of this would have happened
without you two being here, making those
decisions with me in the moment. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion gazes into the distance, as if to see
Ireland beyond the horizon. Looking at her, I'm
filled with the desire to help her create as many
memories as possible.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Yes, precisely! We'll teach you the true meaning
of being pampered.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
You're both so kind. I already feel like I'm being
spoiled by your consideration alone.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Come now, this is exactly what I'm talking about.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
If that's how it's going to be, I'll just have to roll
up my sleeves and really show you a pampering!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Oh, how exciting! Sounds like this will be an
experience to remember.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Certainly, this will be an experience I can only
have here with you! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion gazes into the distance, as if to see
Ireland beyond the horizon. Looking at her, I'm
filled with the desire to help her create as many
memories as possible.
